an4.32:1.1: “There are these four grounds for the bonds of fellowship.
an4.32:1.3: Giving, kind words, beneficial help, consistency.
an4.32:1.4: These are the four grounds for the bonds of fellowship.”
an4.32:2.2: & consistency in the face of events,
an4.32:2.5: These bonds of fellowship (function) in the world
an4.32:2.6: like the linchpins in a moving cart.
an4.32:3.1: Now, if these bonds of fellowship were lacking,
an4.32:3.3: the honor & respect owed by her child,
an4.32:3.4: nor would a father receive what his child owes him.
